hero.title: On Sitting With Uncertainty (And Why It's Actually Fine)
hero.excerpt: I used to think not-knowing was a problem to solve. Turns out it might be the most honest place to live from...

posts.title: The People Who Stay When You're Not Fun Anymore
posts.excerpt: A quiet appreciation for the ones who show up without a reason to impress you.

posts.title: My Slow Morning Experiment: Week Three
posts.excerpt: No phone, no agenda, just coffee and forty-five minutes of actually waking up.

posts.title: Notes to Myself at 23 (From Myself at Now)
posts.excerpt: Some things I wish someone had said, and some things I wouldn't have heard anyway.
